rationale: Section 11.184 governs charitable organization property exemptions and is unrelated to the residence homestead exemption in Section 11.13(b). The proposed change does not affect or conflict with this section.
quote: Sec. 11.184. ORGANIZATIONS ENGAGED PRIMARILY IN PERFORMING CHARITABLE FUNCTIONS.
_note: Rule text concerns charitable organization exemptions, not residence homestead exemptions; no overlap with proposed change.
